feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cannot connect to the Service Instance. The service is currently not available.
entry.content:
Hi 

I'm getting error of "Cannot connect to the Service Instance. The service is currently not available."  thought I have log successfully. Could you please advise on this

entry.title: BTP Cockpit - ABAP trial instance creation issue
entry.content:
Hi Team

When trying to create an ABAP trial version instance in the BTP cockpit, the creation process fails. Could this be due to a planned upgrade or maintenance? If so, does anyone have information on when the maintenance will be completed and when instance creation will be available again?

 

Thanks

Prabhakar

entry.title: Scroll functionality on GRDC Form using Screen Recording
entry.content:
Hi there, I need some assistance in capturing a scroll element using screen recording on SAP BTP to extract data by using the scroll bar to navigate up/down or left/right on the screen. Currently struggling with this functionality.

SAP BTP ABAP environment

entry.title: Run Desktop Agent on each users PC when workflow is trigger by User
entry.content:
Hi there, need assistance in making a desktop agent run a screen recording that captures data off GRDC for each individual on the PC's when they trigger the workflow. Currently the bot will open on the developers PC to do the screen capturing of data even if triggered by a user on they own PC. Please can you advise how to rectify this issue. Thanks

SAP BTP ABAP environment

entry.title: Error occurring while accessing SAP BTP Cloud trial account(Unexpected response code: 503)
entry.content:
Hello- I am facing below error while accessing trial BTP cloud account via ADT tool. I did the entire set up on 17 th May 2025.ADT version is 06-2025

User ID - banerjeeswashrayee@gmail.com

'Logon is not possible: Failed to get service instance URL info for https://685bd85e-501d-43dd-b091-aa6811254f67.abap.us10.hana.ondemand.com: Unexpected response code: 503'Can anyone assist?

entry.title: Not able to create a communication scenario on package in eclipse for ODBC usage
entry.content:
Using the tutorial 'Using ODBC driver for SQL Service' I am not able to create a communication scenario on my package in order to proceed with the ODBC setup interfacing CDS entity views. I refer to step 7 in the tutorial:

Using ODBC driver for SQL Service | SAP Tutorials

The only option to create a communication scenario is on a project instead of a package and I get the message I get is: "Communication Scenario is not supported in the selected project".

entry.title: Unable to create the ABAP environment Instance
entry.content:
I am trying to create instance of ABAP Steampunk, but it failing with error "Forbidden"

entry.title: SAP RAP Free Search and list sort in Fiori Application
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

While creating a sample RAP application from the SAP Learning course "Building Apps with the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model" 

I am caught with 2 issues

1. Free search is not working in the Fiori app. 

Images of BO projection

Fiori Application Data

 

with Free Search

 

 

2. Sorting Order of the List in the Fiori Application

Any advice that could help me understand why I am encountering the above issues would be greatly appreciated.

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model SAP Fiori SAP BTP ABAP environment

entry.title: Create custom entity with compositions exposed as OData V4 API
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I have a question which I am not able to solve by myself ^^

My requirement basically is to create a new custom API in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud that allows me, for a given {warehouse + batch-managed product + quantity}, to find the list of all batch numbers, that can be consumed to address that batch-managed product's quantity based on some rules.

I gave myself as objective to create this structure as output of my new custom API, with a header structure (giving the status of the batch determination logic) and an item list (giving the list of all the batch numbers that should be used for the consumption, with the quantity to be consumed in each batch):

I started by created 2 custom CDS entities: one for the header structure and another one for the item structure.

I added this annotation to both these 2 custom CDS entities "@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy:'ABAP:ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1'" where "ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1'" is a custom class referencing interface "IF_RAP_QUERY_PROVIDER" In order to be able to trigger its method "SELECT" when someone tries to retrieve data from either one of my 2 custom CDS entities. 

In order to have a parent-child relationship between my 2 custom CDS entities, I added a composition statement in the header custom entity CDS view and an association to parent statement in the line-items child custom entity CDS view.

Custom Entity for the Header parent CDS view:

Custom Entity for the Line-Item Child CDS view:

Then I implemented code for the SELECT statement of my custom class ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET1.

Once done, I created a new service definition exposing both my 2 custom cds entities:

Then I exposed my service definition into an OData V4 API service binding, followed with the normal communication scenario, comm arrangement configuration..

My problem is that, once all this is done, when I try to execute my API from POSTMAN, I am not able to get the header AND the item data AT THE SAME TIME.

I am able for instance to get data for the header custom entity CDS view with the correct structure I defined: 

I am also able to get data for the line_item custom entity CDS view, for the different batch numbers to use for the consumption as per the structure I designed:

But, How can I merge these two results of these 2 entities in the same response?

I want my custom API response to be similar to the following one: 

How can I accomplish this please?

I thought by creating a composition relationship between these 2 custom entities, that the SELECT method will fetch data for both header and Item custom entity CDS views and that the result will be merged in the same response, but it is not.

Also, when I run a GET OData call to the header entity, "SELECT" method of class "ZCL_TEST_BATCH_NBR_DET0" is called only once, and "io_request->get_entity_id( )" gives "ZC_TEST_BATCH_DETERMIN_HD" as entity. This means, that my logic is being executed ONLY on the header custom CDS view, which is not enough to fulfill my requirement.

Then I tried to add "$expand" to the OData URL to execute, by adding "?$expand=_BatchDetItemDetails" to my URL:

but I am getting HTTP Bad Request error in POSTMAN : "

"The expand option's expand path contains an invalid property '_BatchDetItemDetails'",

Can someone help me on this please? I feel like my custom API is not designed to "accept" any "expand" attribute. 

Or if you have another idea on how to achieve this, without having to use the "?$expand" statement?

Thanks experts

entry.title: AIF customizing screen not allowing to use /TMINT namespace to integrate FreightOrder proxy
entry.content:
I am trying to integrate SAP TM Freight order standard proxy ( TransportationOrderGenericRequest_In ) to process errors to AIF. Below screen shot is the standard proxy runtime class where we have logic to integrate to AIF.

It has inbuild AIF namespace and Interface name details in the proxy. I am trying to create the given name space /TMINT using /AIF/CUST. I get below error; we cannot save this namespace.

Any suggestions on how to save the namespace or any other approach to achieve this scenario.

entry.title: Class zdmo_cl_fe_travel_generator can't generate Package
entry.content:
Hi Community Experts, 

I having a problem with class zdmo_cl_fe_travel_generator when run the program suppose to generate a Package to add to the library but when i run the class the console is empty and i figure out why. One different that i found was my sub account on SAP BTP is US East but my friend who have a sub account Singapore can run the class zdmo_cl_fe_travel_generator normally and generated a Package to use.

Can someone help me generate the package from class zdmo_cl_fe_travel_generator i really want to learn more about SAP BTP.

Note: I also try running the class zdmo_cl_fe_travel_generator on my other friend eclipse which sub account is also US East but didn't work only the sub account Singapore can generate the package.

Thanks & Regards,

entry.title: RAP: How to Bridge UX Gap Between UUID (Backend) & Semantic Key (UI Value Help)?
entry.content:
Hi

Context/Environment:

We're developing an application using the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP) in a pure ABAP environment (e.g., SAP BTP ABAP Environment or a similar setup without BAS/freestyle UI5 extensions). A key customer requirement is an optimal User Experience (UX). Our database design, following SAP's recommendations for modern application development, is based on UUIDs (RAW(16)) for technical primary and foreign keys.

Problem Statement/Goal (User Experience):

While using UUIDs in the backend offers many advantages, for UI interaction, we want to present users with semantic, human-readable IDs (e.g., a Contact Name) via a Value Help.

  • The user should see a UI field (e.g., "Contact") and use it to open the Value Help.
  • After selecting an entry from the Value Help (e.g., a specific contact name), the corresponding UUID should be written to the (hidden) technical foreign key field in the entity in the background.
  • The core UX issue occurs when creating a new record, before a selection is made via the Value Help. This behavior can be observed, for instance, in the SAP Fiori Elements Feature Showcase (see also attached screenshot, e.g., FSE 007, Object Page, "Contact" field):
    • A UI field logically linked to an (unassigned or initial) UUID foreign key often initially displays the raw UUID (e.g., 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000, as seen for the "Contact" field in the screenshot).
    • The Value Help itself (in the screenshot "Select: Contact") then correctly displays semantic values for selection (e.g., contact names of a character/string type like "Achim Picard").
    • After the user selects a semantic value from the Value Help, this semantic value (e.g., the contact name) is correctly displayed in the input field.
    • However, this initial display of a UUID in the input field sets incorrect expectations for the user regarding the field type and format. It causes confusion because, after selection, the field displays a value of a different type (character/string). From the customer's perspective, this is not a satisfactory User Experience – ideally, when creating a new record, the field should be initially empty or show a suitable placeholder for the expected semantic input, not the technical UUID.

    • Our Questions for the Community and SAP Experts:

      1. What is the recommended best practice in pure ABAP RAP to implement a Value Help for a UUID foreign key (aligning with SAP's recommended design) where the user-facing semantic input field is initially completely empty (and not showing a 0000...-UUID) when creating a new record, until a value is selected?
      2. How does SAP itself address this UX requirement in its own standard Fiori apps (built with RAP) or in more detailed examples like the referenced "fiori-elements-feature-showcase," specifically for fields representing UUID-based foreign keys that should be initially empty on new record creation?

      We would appreciate any pointers, best practices, or solutions that can help us optimize the User Experience for our customers within the pure ABAP RAP stack.

      Thanks in advance!

      Fouad

entry.title: RAP on Dynamic Condition Tables – Draft Enablement Challenge
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m working on a requirement where the underlying tables are dynamic (condition tables). I need to build a RAP application on top of this setup. However, I'm facing a challenge: I can't enable draft functionality because the CDS view is a query implemented by a class, and draft is not supported in this scenario.

Draft functionality is crucial for my use case. Does anyone have experience with a similar setup or suggestions on how to handle this? Any ideas on enabling draft or dynamically handling such data in a RAP application would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: bapi_po_create1 : passing standard table field J_1BNBM into bapi
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,
I have a field J_1BNBM in EKPO table which is getting field with control code.
There is validaion in po creation ME21N using method IF_EX_ME_PROCESS_PO_CUST~PROCESS_ITEM to make the field as mandatory due to which I am getting the
same error while using the BAPI_PO_CREATE1.
However, there is no field available  in line item of BAPI_PO_CREATE1 of related to J_1BNBM or control code.
The bapi will only post the PO if I could able to pass control_code(J_1BNBM)  using the same BAPI.
I thought of using as well as tried to achieve it through extension . But extension is for only customer add on fields .

J_1BNBM is standard field in EKPO and not customer field.

How to resolve this issue as I am at crossroads now ?

entry.title: RELEASE STRATEGY in PURCHASE REQUISITION AT header level not getting displayed
entry.content:
Hi Gurus, Release strategy tab is not showing after check in service PR though it is working for material PR.
It is working fine in QAS but facing issue only in DEV.I have checked the configuration part along with functional in both DEV and QAS
and everything seems correct .

HEADER WISE NO ERRORS


I have compared the code in both DEV and QAS for EXIT_SAPLEBND_001 . Both are same. But still release strategy tab is not coming
in DEV.
Recently we have got requirement to make SRVPOS field mandatory in service PR  for which I have implemented 4 methods

 

 


IF_EX_ME_PROCESS_REQ_CUST~FIELDSELECTION_HEADER_REFKEYS
FIELDSELECTION_HEADER
FIELDSELECTION_ITEM_REFKEYS
FIELDSELECTION_ITEM

 


I was working on all these 4 methods where I was trying to make the SRVPOS field mandatory which was not successful.
However, the functional had made it mandatory from the configuration.
I have commented all the code in 4 methods.

Once the release strategy issue started, I have mapped the import and export
parameters expecting the release strategy would work. but it did not.
Now the functional has reversed the changes of making the SRVPOS field mandatory as not required . but the issue not fixed.
Both functional and as technical from my end everything seems fine but Release strategy tab is not popping at header in DEV though
it is working fine in QAS.
I was trying to debug the standard code whole day but I am unable to find some solution.
Please help me how to get the release strategy tab in DEV .

entry.title: Error Create Basic FreeStyle VSCode
entry.content:
Hi!

  After completing the Trial Period of my BTP Trail, I renewed it as I always did.
  However, this last time, after creating my CDS ABAP RAP through Eclipse, I tried to create SAP Fiori Generator (Basic FreeStyle) through VSCode and it shows this error in "Data Source: Connect to a System" and "System: yyyy@xxx.com". The error is attached. Could you help me?

 

Thank you!

entry.title: Best Approach to Trigger SAP CPI Interface Periodically from S/4HANA with Dynamic Plant/S.Loc
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement where a SAP CPI interface needs to be triggered once or twice daily. This interface performs the following:

--Accepts Plant and Storage Location as input.

--Fetches product data using an OData API in S/4HANA and some additional info from other APIs.

--Sends the final data to a target system.

What we initially considered:

Timer-based iFlow in CPI, with plant and storage location maintained as externalized parameters in a content modifier.

----Rejected by the team due to manual effort involved in changing parameters each time we want to trigger for different plant/storage location.

SAP BTP Job Scheduler: Allows periodic triggering and could call a CPI endpoint with required parameters. Currently in discussion. If selected, the job would pass Plant and Storage Location as part of the payload to CPI.

S/4HANA-triggered interface via SOAP/IDoc: S/4 can periodically send data (plant and storage location) via a custom ABAP job, which triggers a CPI endpoint using SOAP or sends an IDoc. This seems promising, but I would like to know what’s more standard/recommended.

Constraints:

We cannot use custom Z-tables in S/4HANA to manage or store configuration.

CPI as a public API for third-party to call isn’t suitable, as the source system must be S/4 or CI.

Event Mesh is not applicable here, since there is no real-time change or event-based trigger. It’s purely a periodic push.

My Questions:

1) Between BTP Job Scheduler and S/4HANA SOAP/IDoc push, which would be more recommended and scalable?

2) Are there any other better or more standard options to periodically trigger a CPI interface with dynamic parameters like plant and storage location?

entry.title: ABAP for Cloud Development - ABAP Push Channel Applications
entry.content:
Latest SAP Documentation shows how to create ABAP Push Channel Applications. However, object type SAMC is not supported in ABAP Cloud so this cannot be used while building clean core add-ons (ABAP for Cloud Development packages).

An SAP developer tutorial on AMC + ABAP Daemons almost matched our use-case, but the tutorial relies on an external  MQTT Broker (HiveMQ). While developing installable on-prem, clean-core ABAP add-ons, it is not logical to use an external MQTT Broker. I believe this will also be an issue for anyone running SAP BTP ABAP Environment that would like to make use of ABAP message channels.  

Is this a reasonable SAP Influence request and would there be some support from others in community for this functionality within ABAP Cloud? Please let me know if there is any other reasonable way to integrate AMC Applications with the ABAP for Cloud Development (without using an external message broker).

__PRESENT__PRESENT__PRESENT

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: what if i dont follow sequential orders of events in a classical report ?
entry.content:
I have been asked this question multiple times.

we have events starting from initialisation to start of selection. what if i write events in irregular order or dont even write events ?

if it works, then whats the significance of these ?

help me with this or share some good blog

entry.title: SSO not working. OAuth2UserTokenExchange. Unable to login to travel list app
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

Recently I deployed an app to HTML5 Repository in SAP BTP

html5 app repository:

when i click on "sapfedemotravellist"  , i am presented with an alert in the new tab:

even after putting correct id and password this just keeps on coming. I tried with client id and client secret also and still the same alert keep popping.

Please help me resolve this issue.

Destination:

Destination Trust:

Trial Users:

Subaccount Trial: Trust Configuration:

Subscriptions & Instances:

App's xs-security.json

{
  "xsappname": "sapfedemotravellist",
  "tenant-mode": "dedicated",
  "description": "Security profile of called application",
  "scopes": [],
  "role-templates": []
}
 
xs-app.json
 
{
  "welcomeFile": "/index.html",
  "authenticationMethod": "route",
  "routes": [
    {
      "source": "^/sap/(.*)$",
      "target": "/sap/$1",
      "destination": "abap-cloud-default_abap-trial-########trial-dev",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa",
      "csrfProtection": false
    },
    {
      "source": "^/resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^/test-resources/(.*)$",
      "target": "/test-resources/$1",
      "authenticationType": "none",
      "destination": "ui5"
    },
    {
      "source": "^(.*)$",
      "target": "$1",
      "service": "html5-apps-repo-rt",
      "authenticationType": "xsuaa"
    }
  ]
}

Please help in this regard.

@SAPSupport 

@jlong 

@K120525 

@dennis_koehler 

@DonWilliams 

@paula_augedahl 

@Sandra_Rossi 

@William_Wu 

@Ulrich_Schmidt 

@sapcommunity
